task:
xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="urn:oasis:names:tc:dita:xsd:task.xsd"> How to Create a DITA topic in Oxygen XML This task explains the steps to create a DITA topic using oxygen xml
Open Oxygen XML Editor
Go to File -> New and select the desired DITA topic type.
Enter a file name and choose a file location.
Add content in Author or Text mode.
Validate the file using the Validateaction.
You have successfully created a DITA topic
